/usr/bin/ar qc libmesh_node_lib.a CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/api/event_bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/compute/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/compute/task_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/compute/worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/discovery/lan_broadcast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/main_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/monitoring/metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/node_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/peer_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/security/channel_encryption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/security/key_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mesh_node_lib.dir/transport/tcp_transport.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmesh_node_lib.a
